description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular profile. It is equipped with a collapsible stock at the rear, providing adjustable length for user comfort and compact storage. The upper receiver sports a Picatinny rail system, allowing for the attachment of various optics and accessories, and currently mounts a red dot sight. The handguard is elongated and vented, likely made from lightweight metal or reinforced polymer, and the barrel is fitted with a suppressor for reduced muzzle flash and noise. A vertical foregrip is attached beneath the handguard, enhancing stability and control during firing. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban tactical rifles.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and vertical foregrip, finished in matte black. The design features a vented handguard and Picatinny rail for accessories.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, suppressor, and mounted red dot sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same tactical features, with clear visibility of the stock and foregrip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the collapsible stock and the alignment of the sight and rail system.
